title: Arcadia Garden Products PSW Pot Collection Plant Saucer Drip Tray, Durable Water Tray for Indoor and Outdoor Flower Plant Pots and Planters, 10-inch, Terra Cotta Marble Color
features: PROTECT YOUR SURFACES: Water spills from indoor houseplants can cause damage to surfaces such as a wood, carpet, and flooring. Plant saucers protect these surfaces while still allowing your potted flowers and plants to drain excess water.
LIGHTWEIGHT & DURABLE: PSW products are durable, lightweight, and resistant to weather conditions and UV rays for extended outdoor use.
MADE WITH RECYCLED MATERIALS: A blend of recycled plastic, stone powder, and wood dust, PSW Pots are eye-catching and long-lasting for mindful gardening.
ONE-OF-A-KIND: Due to the blending of recycled materials, every PSW pot is unique with slight variations that infer an artisan’s touch.

VARIETY: Having choices makes a difference when creating a certain look in your garden or sunroom. PSW products are available in a variety of shapes, sizes, and colors whether for complementing your existing gardenscape or creating a new garden or patio look.
*Please Review the Dimension Photo for Exact Size*
description: Part of our award-winning PSW Pot Collection, plant saucers from Arcadia Garden Products are made from a mix of recycled plastic, stone powder, and wood dust. Great for both indoor and outdoor use, the shallow dish positioned under a planter or garden pot catches excess water and prevents the initial runoff from spilling onto the surface below. The winning combination of recycled ingredients in the PSW line makes this an attractive, lightweight product that is also weather resistant and easy to clean. These saucers are available in a variety of colors and sizes. A thoughtful gift for those who enjoy plants and planting, PSW Pots have exceptional strength and eye-catching visual appeal. And because it coordinates with other PSW containers, you can choose from a variety of additional matching pots to make your garden collection complete.
